overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking through a dystopian urban environment during a severe sandstorm. The scene features heavy orange atmospheric fog, scattered debris, neon signage, and occasional pedestrians in a gritty commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow foggy alley between industrial buildings

events.description: moving from open alley into covered area beneath large concrete overpass
ambient light decreases significantly as camera moves deeper under overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through debris-filled alley toward a distant palm tree visible through orange fog

entered.detail: large illuminated red billboard mounted on building facade displaying text
tall palm tree swaying in wind at end of alley, barely visible through heavy fog
red brick building with small windows and industrial architecture
massive concrete overpass spanning across the alley overhead
papers and debris littering the asphalt ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, foggy alley with orange atmospheric haze. The player walks forward past a red brick industrial building on the left and a large digital billboard on the right, heading toward a distant palm tree. Around 8 seconds, the camera moves under a massive concrete overpass, significantly reducing ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with trash accumulation

events.description: encountering a woman standing beside a large green dumpster
exiting covered overpass area into open foggy street with visible pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating past trash piles and a dumpster where a woman stands, then emerging onto the open street

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing standing beside green dumpster, looking toward the street

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster with open lid overflowing with trash
metal security fence with barbed wire running along the sidewalk edge
piles of yellow and blue garbage bags accumulated next to dumpster
tall street light pole emerging from fog

segments.scene_description: Walking under the overpass, the camera passes large trash piles and a green dumpster where a woman stands. The environment is sheltered from the storm but dark. Around 26 seconds, the player emerges from under the overpass into a more open street area where distant pedestrians become visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial intersection with diner and traffic signals

events.description: pedestrian density increases with multiple people walking in various directions
approaching Kenmore Diner with illuminated blue neon signage becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking through open street navigating around scattered pedestrians, approaching an intersection with a traffic light

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and dark pants walking across the road
group of two pedestrians walking away into the dense fog

entered.detail: commercial building with prominent blue neon sign reading KENMORE DINER
tall traffic signal pole with green light illuminated
cars parked along the foggy street curb
large dark building facade with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a wider commercial street with moderate pedestrian traffic moving through the orange fog. The Kenmore Diner's blue neon sign becomes visible on the right, providing a focal point through the haze. The camera approaches a traffic light at an intersection, navigating around pedestrians while parked cars line the foggy street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, hazy alleyway through a dark underpass and into a wider, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by moving through a dense orange atmospheric haze past a red brick industrial building and a large digital billboard toward a distant palm tree. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into the deep shadows of a massive concrete overpass, passing piles of trash and a woman standing by a green dumpster. The environment then opens up as the player emerges from the shelter of the overpass back into the storm, where the orange fog reveals distant pedestrians. Finally, the camera navigates a wider street lined with parked cars, moving toward a traffic light at an intersection while the blue neon sign of the Kenmore Diner cuts through the haze.
